---
title: "Shenandoah River Mark-Recapture Methods"
bibliography: sections/references.bib 
format: docx
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)
library(fs)
source_python("../../config/paths.py")
source_path = path(SCRIPTS / 'load_report_results.r')
source(source_path)
#source(source_path)
```

'r SCRIPTS'

{{< include sections/methods.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/results.qmd >}}
